title: Mastering Implicature
description: What a speaker means beyond what they say — Gricean maxims and conversational implicature.
summary_pt_br: Implicatura: o que o falante quer dizer além do que diz. Máximas de Grice: quantidade, qualidade, relação, maneira.

scenes.subtitle_en: What a speaker means beyond what they say — Gricean maxims and conversational implicature.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Implicatura: o que o falante quer dizer além do que diz. Máximas de Grice: quantidade, qualidade, relação, maneira.

scenes.text_en: What a speaker means beyond what they say — Gricean maxims and conversational implicature. Focus: mastering implicature. 'Some students passed' implicates not all passed.
scenes.text_pt: Implicatura: o que o falante quer dizer além do que diz. Máximas de Grice: quantidade, qualidade, relação, maneira. Foco: mastering implicature. 'Alguns alunos passaram' implica que nem todos.

scenes.title: Mastering Implicature
scenes.body_en: Grice's four maxims: QUANTITY (right amount), QUALITY (truth), RELATION (relevance), MANNER (clarity). Violating any one triggers implicature — the hidden meaning.
scenes.body_pt: Implicatura: o que o falante quer dizer além do que diz. Máximas de Grice: quantidade, qualidade, relação, maneira.

examples.en: 'Some students passed' implicates not all passed.
examples.pt: 'Alguns alunos passaram' implica que nem todos.

examples.en: Saying 'it's getting late' often means 'let's go'.
A flat 'fine' can mean anything but fine.
examples.pt: Um 'tudo bem' seco pode significar tudo menos bem.

exercise.question: Complete: "'Some students passed' ___ not all passed."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "'Some students passed' implicates not all passed."
exercise.hint_pt_br: 'Alguns alunos passaram' implica que nem todos.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Saying 'it's getting late' often means 'let's go'.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Saying 'it's getting late' often means 'let's go'."
Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Mastering Implicature — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre mastering implicature. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Give me an implicature from 'some passed'.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Quality — you say what you don't believe.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That the current topic is sensitive.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Why is pragmatics at C2 level?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Because rules of meaning exceed grammar.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do learners spot implicature in real speech?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: By tracking tone and context together.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Implicature is the grammar of what's unsaid.

scenes.title: The linguistics seminar
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize two Gricean maxims and one real-life implicature. Use at least three linguistic terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the linguistics seminar, Zara listened to a professor explain why 'some' almost never means 'all'.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Grice's maxim of quantity tells us to say just enough — no more, no less than the situation requires.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: So when my mother says 'it's getting late', she is implicating that my friends should go home.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Exactly. The literal proposition is a time observation — the pragmatic force is a polite expulsion.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: C2 learners, in my experience, stop translating words and start tracking speaker intent across context.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Implicature, the professor concluded, is where grammar ends and social life begins speaking in riddles.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Mastering Implicature". What a speaker means beyond what they say — Gricean maxims and conversational implicature. 'Some students passed' implicates not all passed. Saying 'it's getting late' often means 'let's go'. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Mastering Implicature". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
